mano_cua.result_summary: 发现 UX Bug：折叠区域收起时的 layout shift + 滚动调整导致意外点击。展开状态下按钮所在位置在折叠后因内容消失和页面自动滚动，变成其他元素的位置，快速点击可能触发非预期操作。使用 DevTools 移动端模拟和 CSS 检查确认折叠机制为自定义实现（非 HTML details/summary），但未能在有限步骤内确认 pointer-events 是否正确设置为 none。硬超时终止。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Confirmed UX bug where fast collapse of section with scroll adjustment causes unintended clicks on other elements. When section collapses: page auto-scrolls, new content appears at positions where hidden buttons were, clicking where a hidden button was now hits a different button due to layout shift. Custom collapse implementation (not native details/summary). Timeout before fully verifying CSS pointer-events property.
